en: A: Welcome, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Welcome, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: te’o mhia soetohva, pano imu phieni?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: panto, tee pio na teko phini?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: uk’as’a, o’a lamzas’a mhino no fi’i.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.

ab: tee pio no efucu na teko phini?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: poa tuyu no cfua ho faeni a’o.
en: A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.
B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: te’o mhia yusno pania ci hʉsʉ.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.
B: Only one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: te pio no kinkina na teko phini?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: te pio no kinkina na teko phini ci fcuyu?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: te’o mhia yusno peongu ci nengi.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: micuc’o tuno peongu, naho acuha yaa.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: isi supzoi ’emo cono cfua ci fʉesʉ?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: mo acʉhʉ sumpusku ucni, tec’o poa sumpusku.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.
A: Here's $95.
B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.
A:All $510.
B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: mo angu pepe eni, tee peela ake’a poa cʉecʉ?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: o’a tes’a, ’a micu na’no cuecʉ na eni.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: te’o phini ’emo cono cfua ci kamcia.
en: A: I want to buy this packet of cookies.

ab: mo sumtueha, pano tekon’a ’ucea yaa ci macucuma?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
